source_pr.title: executor: dom.close() in test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

symptoms: t.Skip("race test for this case takes too long time")
failure_signature: t.Skip("race test for this case takes too long time")
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: dom.close() in test.

evidence: evidence: t.Skip("race test for this case takes too long time")
